node.content-desc:
This is a mobile coffee truck that you can usually find parked in the same lot as Midwife and the Baker in Mountain View on select days of the week. I was lucky enough to catch them while visiting the bakery.
It’s a cute little setup, and I decided to try an iced mocha. The coffee was decent — good enough, though nothing particularly extraordinary or standout. They do offer a variety of drink options, along with some in-house syrups you can customize your drink with, which is a nice touch.
Overall, it’s worth checking out if you’re already in the area and looking for a quick coffee stop.

node.text:
This is a mobile coffee truck that you can usually find parked in the same lot as Midwife and the Baker in Mountain View on select days of the week. I was lucky enough to catch them while visiting the bakery.
It’s a cute little setup, and I decided to try an iced mocha. The coffee was decent — good enough, though nothing particularly extraordinary or standout. They do offer a variety of drink options, along with some in-house syrups you can customize your drink with, which is a nice touch.
Overall, it’s worth checking out if you’re already in the area and looking for a quick coffee stop.

Mountain View on select days of the week. I was lucky enough to catch them while visiting the bakery. It’s a cute little setup, and I decided to try an iced mocha. The coffee was decent — good enough, though nothing particularly extraordinary or standout. They do offer a variety of drink options, along with some in-house syrups you can customize your drink with, which is a nice touch. Overall, it’s worth checking out if you’re already in the area and looking for a quick coffee stop.

node.content-desc: Helpful. Review 1 for Boast coffee by Debisree Ray.
Helpful. Review 1 for Boast coffee by Debisree Ray.
Unhelpful. Review 1 for Boast coffee by Debisree Ray.
Unhelpful. Review 1 for Boast coffee by Debisree Ray.
Overflow menu of review 2 for Boast coffee by L W

The last few times I visited The midwife and the Baker, I didn’t see the coffee van. Since they were just opening up shop, I wanted to give them a try except I couldn’t find the business on Google (I wanted to see the menu/drink offerings). Turns out the business is not called “Good Coffee” but “Boast Coffee.” From an advertisement/business perspective, I think it would be nice to have the name more legible and BIGGER. That being said, coffee was excellent. I had the Maple Bourbon latte and it had a great balance of bitterness and sweet.

node.text: The last few times I visited The midwife and the Baker, I didn’t see the coffee van. Since they were just opening up shop, I wanted to give them a try except I couldn’t find the business on Google (I wanted to see the menu/drink offerings). Turns out the business is not called “Good Coffee” but “Boast Coffee.” From an advertisement/business perspective, I think it would be nice to have the name more legible and BIGGER. That being said, coffee was excellent. I had the Maple Bourbon latte and it had a great balance of bitterness and sweet.

up shop, I wanted to give them a try except I couldn’t find the business on Google (I wanted to see the menu/drink offerings). Turns out the business is not called “Good Coffee” but “Boast Coffee.” From an advertisement/business perspective, I think it would be nice to have the name more legible and BIGGER. That being said, coffee was excellent. I had the Maple Bourbon latte and it had a great balance of bitterness and sweet.
